title: From private suites to $20,000 seats: Luxury travelers have more ways to splurge while many passengers can’t afford economy
summary: Airlines are investing heavily in premium cabin upgrades to capture spending from high-value customers. This reflects widening income inequality in air travel, as premium offerings expand while economy passengers face affordability challenges.
content: Airlines are pouring money into flashy premium-class upgrades to keep attracting big spenders.

zh.title: 从私人套房到2万美元的座位：奢侈旅客有更多方式挥霍，而许多乘客买不起经济舱
zh.summary: 航空公司正在大力投资高端舱位升级，以吸引高价值客户的消费。这反映了航空旅行中日益扩大的收入不平等，因为在高端产品扩展的同时，经济舱乘客面临可承受性挑战。

title: ChatGPT is so 2025 — here are the real AI gold mines for investors in 2026
summary: Investment capital is increasingly flowing to AI applications in defense, healthcare, and autonomous agents rather than generalist chatbots. These sectors represent the emerging growth opportunities as AI technology matures beyond consumer chatbots.
content: Money is flooding into AI. Defense, healthcare and agentics are the big winners, writes Mark Minevich.

zh.title: ChatGPT已经过时了——以下是2026年投资者真正的人工智能金矿
zh.summary: 投资资本越来越多地流向国防、医疗和自主代理等领域的人工智能应用，而非通用聊天机器人。随着人工智能技术成熟超越消费者聊天机器人，这些行业代表了新兴的增长机会。

title: Trump and journalists will be closely watched to see how they get along at White House correspondents' dinner
summary: President Trump will attend the White House Correspondents' Dinner this year, marking a change from his previous administrations. The dynamics between the president and press corps will be closely scrutinized at the event.
content: The Republican president did not attend the dinner during his first term or the first year of his second.

zh.title: 特朗普和记者将在白宫记者晚宴上受到密切关注，看他们如何相处
zh.summary: 特朗普总统今年将出席白宫记者晚宴，这标志着与他之前政府任期的一个转变。总统与新闻界之间的互动将在活动中受到密切审查。

title: Market chaos gives money managers a chance to beat index funds — just like they’re supposed to do
summary: Volatile market conditions create opportunities for active managers to outperform passive index funds by strategically avoiding overvalued sectors. This challenges the long-standing passive investing philosophy that dominates the industry.
content: The “set it and forget it” strategy is at risk in volatile markets. Savvy managers can dodge sectors your index fund is forced to own.

zh.title: 市场混乱给基金经理一个击败指数基金的机会——这正是他们应该做的
zh.summary: 波动的市场条件为主动投资经理提供了通过战略性地规避高估部门来超越被动指数基金的机会。这挑战了长期以来主导行业的被动投资理念。

title: 3 forces that drove another historic – yet volatile – week for the S&P 500
summary: The S&P 500 experienced significant volatility driven by Iran tensions, corporate earnings reports, and divergent performance between hardware and software stocks. These competing forces shaped market movements throughout the week.
content: The Iran war wasn't the only focus. Corporate earnings and a split between hardware and software stocks caught our attention as well.

zh.title: 推动标普500指数又一个历史性波动周的3个力量
zh.summary: 标普500指数因伊朗紧张局势、企业收益报告和硬件与软件股票表现的差异而经历显著波动。这些竞争力量在整周内塑造了市场走向。

title: The meme-stock frenzy is a warning — these 7 high-quality stocks are better bets
summary: The article cautions against speculative meme stocks, recommending dividend-paying stocks as more reliable investment choices. High-quality dividend stocks are positioned as superior long-term investments compared to speculative trading trends.
content: Dividend-paying winners are likely to outperform a meme-themed ETF.

zh.title: 迷因股狂热是一个警告——这7只高质量股票是更好的选择
zh.summary: 该文章警告不要投资投机性的迷因股，推荐股息支付股票作为更可靠的投资选择。高质量的股息股票被认为是与投机交易趋势相比更好的长期投资。

title: This is what critics of Apple and Tim Cook get dead wrong
summary: Apple's strategy focuses on leveraging hardware as the primary pathway to profit from artificial intelligence advances. The company's approach differs from critics' perspectives on how to capitalize on the AI revolution.
content: Apple’s true innovation is betting  on hardware as the clearest path to profit from the AI revolution.

zh.title: 苹果和蒂姆·库克的批评者完全搞错的地方
zh.summary: 苹果的战略专注于利用硬件作为从人工智能进步中获利的主要途径。该公司的方法与批评者关于如何从人工智能革命中获利的观点不同。

title: White House Correspondents’ dinner has morphed into a ‘Hollywoodified’ weekend of nonstop parties. Even Grindr is hosting.
summary: The White House Correspondents' Dinner weekend has expanded into a multi-day celebration with numerous high-profile parties and corporate events, some costing up to $300,000. President Trump's attendance is expected for this year's festivities.
content: President Donald Trump will be on hand for this weekend’s festivities. So will dozens of media and companies throwing events that can cost $300,000.

zh.title: 白宫记者协会晚宴已演变成一个充满不间断派对的"好莱坞化"周末。连Grindr都在举办活动。
zh.summary: 白宫记者协会晚宴周末已扩展为一个多日庆典，包括众多高调派对和企业活动，其中一些耗资高达30万美元。预计特朗普总统将参加今年的庆祝活动。

title: From car and phone to tractor owners, a populist wave is rising to end the 'captive' repair economy
summary: A growing 'right to repair' movement is gaining political traction across the U.S., with candidates from multiple parties advocating for consumer repair rights. The issue has become central to affordability messaging in political campaigns.
content: "Right to repair" legislation is an issue that political candidates across the U.S. have made part of their affordability messaging.

zh.title: 从汽车和手机到拖拉机所有者，一股民粹浪潮正在兴起，终结"垄断"维修经济
zh.summary: 一个不断增长的"维修权"运动正在美国获得政治支持，来自多个政党的候选人倡导消费者维修权。该问题已成为政治竞选中关于可负担性信息的核心。

title: Some young Americans scale back dating as costs and apps add pressure, survey shows
summary: Young Americans are reducing dating frequency as rising costs and paid dating app subscriptions strain budgets. Dating has become a significant financial decision for younger generations.
content: Dating is becoming a financial decision for young Americans, with higher costs and paid apps leading many to cut back on dates.

zh.title: 一些美国年轻人因费用和应用压力而减少约会，调查显示
zh.summary: 美国年轻人因费用上升和付费约会应用订阅支出而减少约会频率。约会已成为年轻一代的重大财务决策。

title: $300 bags, $150 earrings, $60 hats: Mid-priced products are a status symbol for young shoppers
summary: Gen Z and millennial consumers with disposable income are increasingly choosing mid-priced products over both luxury and discount options as status symbols. This shift reflects changing consumption patterns among younger affluent consumers.
content: A growing number of Gen Zers and millennial consumers with disposable income are shifting away from both luxury- and discount-priced retail items alike.

zh.title: 300美元的包包、150美元的耳环、60美元的帽子：中价位产品成为年轻购物者的身份象征
zh.summary: 拥有可支配收入的Z世代和千禧一代消费者越来越倾向于选择中价位产品而非奢侈品或折扣商品作为身份象征。这一转变反映了年轻富裕消费者消费模式的改变。

title: 36-year-old left the U.S. for China—now pays $1,000 rent and $100 for groceries for family of 4: It's my 'version of the American Dream’
summary: Bradley Krae relocated to Shenzhen, China where he spends significantly less on housing and groceries while working as an English teacher. He describes his experience as achieving his own version of the American Dream through lower cost of living and lifestyle satisfaction.
content: A decade ago, Bradley Krae left the United States to teach English in Shenzhen, China. He spends less money and says the has found his own version of the American Dream there.

zh.title: 36岁美国人移居中国——现在4口之家的房租只需1000美元、食费100美元：这是我的"美国梦版本"
zh.summary: Bradley Krae搬迁到中国深圳，在担任英语教师期间大幅降低了住房和食品开支。他将这段经历描述为通过更低的生活成本和生活方式满足感实现了自己版本的美国梦。

title: AI talent war: Software industry is a new target as top executives jump ship to OpenAI
summary: Software industry executives are leaving major tech companies for OpenAI as the sector faces declining stock performance amid AI disruption fears. The talent exodus represents a growing competitive challenge for established software giants.
content: Software giants are seeing their worst stock performance in years on fears of AI disruption. Now they have a new problem.

zh.title: AI人才战争：软件行业成新目标，顶级高管跳槽OpenAI
zh.summary: 软件行业高管正在离开大型科技公司加入OpenAI，因为该行业面临AI颠覆担忧中股票表现下滑。人才外流代表了对老牌软件巨头日益增长的竞争挑战。

title: Berkshire attracts interest as it slips further behind the S&P 500
summary: Berkshire Hathaway's underperformance relative to the S&P 500 is attracting investor interest despite the stock decline. The undervaluation is creating opportunities for contrarian investors.
content: As Berkshire Hathaway shares fall, the stock is drawing attention from some investors.

zh.title: 伯克希尔引发关注，因其进一步落后于标普500指数
zh.summary: 尽管股价下跌，伯克希尔哈撒韦相对于标普500指数的表现不佳正在吸引投资者关注。这种低估为逆向投资者创造了机会。

title: Semiconductor names make up a big portion of this week’s most overbought stocks
summary: Advanced Micro Devices, Microchip Technology, and Texas Instruments led this week's list of overbought semiconductor stocks. The sector's high valuations reflect investor enthusiasm for semiconductor names.
content: Advanced Micro Devices, Microchip Technology and Texas Instruments made this week's list of most overbought stocks.

zh.title: 半导体股成为本周超买股票的主要部分
zh.summary: 超威半导体、美微芯片和德州仪器在本周超买半导体股票榜单中领先。该行业的高估值反映了投资者对半导体的热情。

title: Investors who think it’s time to move on from the Iran war should look at these numbers
summary: Wall Street shows optimism about potential de-escalation of military operations in the Persian Gulf, though oil markets remain volatile amid uncertainty. This matters because energy market stability significantly impacts global economic growth and inflation concerns.
content: There’s optimism on Wall Street that military operations in the Persian Gulf may be winding down, but oil markets remain on edge.

zh.title: 认为该放弃伊朗战争的投资者应该看看这些数据
zh.summary: 华尔街对波斯湾军事行动可能缓和的前景表示乐观，但在不确定性中油市仍然波动剧烈。这很重要，因为能源市场稳定性对全球经济增长和通胀担忧产生重大影响。

title: Using ChatGPT to order takeout is the future of food
summary: Major restaurant chains like Starbucks and Little Caesars are integrating ChatGPT to streamline ordering and operations, with industry leaders touting AI as a transformative force in food service. The partnerships highlight how large food companies are adopting AI to enhance customer experience and operational efficiency.
content: AI “is the sizzle in the restaurant world,” industry reps say, as Starbucks and Little Caesars partner with ChatGPT.

zh.title: 用ChatGPT点餐是食品行业的未来
zh.summary: 星巴克和小凯撒等主要连锁餐厅正在集成ChatGPT来简化点餐和运营，行业领袖称AI是食品服务业的变革力量。这些合作展示了大型食品公司如何采用AI来增强客户体验和运营效率。

title: This little-known ETF is up over 600% amid U.S.-Iran war, a better trade than oil or energy stocks
summary: The Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) has gained over 600% year-to-date, significantly outpacing traditional energy investments during the U.S.-Iran conflict. The surge reflects increased demand for shipping capacity amid geopolitical tensions affecting global oil trade routes.
content: The Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) has surged more than 600% since the beginning of the year, vastly outperforming crude oil and energy stocks.

zh.title: 这只鲜为人知的ETF在美伊战争中上涨超600%，比石油或能源股更好的交易
zh.summary: Breakwave油轮航运ETF（BWET）年迄今已上涨超600%，在美伊冲突期间明显超过了传统能源投资。这一涨幅反映了地缘政治紧张局势对全球石油贸易路线造成的影响，导致对船舶运力需求增加。

title: My niece, 39, is unhappy and not saving for retirement. How do I approach her?
summary: A family member seeks advice on how to address her 39-year-old niece's lack of retirement savings, following the niece's career exit two years ago due to workplace stress. The situation raises broader questions about financial planning, career transitions, and family financial discussions.
content: “Two years ago, she walked away from what had once been a promising career after a turbulent management change left her overwhelmed.”

zh.title: 我39岁的侄女不开心，也没有为退休存钱。我应该怎样与她谈这个问题？
zh.summary: 一位家庭成员寻求建议，如何与她39岁的侄女讨论退休储蓄不足的问题。两年前，侄女因工作压力而离职。这个情况引发了关于财务规划、职业转变和家庭财务讨论的更广泛问题。

title: Jerome Powell’s final Fed press conference marks an end to an era
summary: Jerome Powell's final Federal Reserve press conference represents a significant shift in Fed communication practices, as incoming chair Kevin Warsh may discontinue the regular media Q&A sessions. This potential change could reduce transparency and alter how monetary policy is communicated to markets and the public.
content: President Trump’s pick for Fed chair, Kevin Warsh, may cancel the regular Q&A with reporters.

zh.title: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔的最后一次美联储新闻发布会标志着一个时代的结束
zh.summary: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔最后一次美联储新闻发布会代表了美联储沟通方式的重大转变，因为即将上任的主席凯文·沃什可能会停止定期的媒体问答环节。这一潜在改变可能会降低透明度，改变货币政策向市场和公众的传达方式。

title: It’s China’s duty-free retail mecca and a tropical oasis, to boot. For Beijing that’s no longer enough.
summary: China's Hainan province, known as a duty-free shopping destination and tourist hub, faces new directives from Beijing that signal the central government wants expanded economic contributions beyond tourism and retail. This reflects Beijing's broader economic priorities and strategic role for the island province.
content: The island province of Hainan has new marching orders.

zh.title: 它是中国的免税零售中心和热带绿洲。但对北京来说，这还远远不够
zh.summary: 中国海南省以免税购物目的地和旅游枢纽著称，但北京新的指令表明中央政府希望该岛省在旅游和零售以外做出更广泛的经济贡献。这反映了北京更广泛的经济优先事项以及对该岛省战略作用的期待。

title: Apple will soon deliver billions more in cash to investors. Here’s how it stacks up to the rest of Big Tech.
summary: Apple is set to return billions to shareholders through capital allocation strategies, with the company and Alphabet demonstrating superior execution in share buyback programs compared to competitors. These buybacks have been particularly effective at boosting earnings per share, a key metric for investor returns.
content: Apple and Alphabet have been most effective at using buybacks to increase earnings per share.

zh.title: 苹果即将向投资者返还数十亿美元。看看它与科技巨头其他公司相比如何。
zh.summary: 苹果准备通过资本分配策略向股东返还数十亿美元,该公司和Alphabet在股票回购计划中相比竞争对手表现出色。这些回购在提高每股收益方面特别有效,这是投资者回报的关键指标。

title: U.S. State Department orders global warning about alleged China AI thefts by DeepSeek, others: Reuters
summary: The U.S. State Department has issued a global warning about alleged intellectual property theft by Chinese AI companies including DeepSeek, citing concerns about security of American AI research. This escalation reflects growing U.S. concerns about technology competition and cybersecurity threats from China.
content: The U.S. is reportedly targeting alleged efforts by Chinese companies to steal intellectual property from American AI labs.

zh.title: 美国国务院下令发布全球警告,涉及DeepSeek等公司涉嫌中国AI知识产权盗窃事件:路透社
zh.summary: 美国国务院发布了全球警告,指控包括DeepSeek在内的中国AI公司涉嫌知识产权盗窃,对美国AI研究的安全表示担忧。这种升级反映了美国对中国技术竞争和网络安全威胁的日益增长的关切。

title: Iran says no meeting with U.S. negotiators planned in Pakistan, with Trump envoys due to head to Islamabad
summary: U.S. special envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner are heading to Islamabad for diplomatic engagement, though Iran has stated no direct U.S.-Iran negotiations are scheduled. The visit underscores ongoing diplomatic efforts in the region amid broader geopolitical tensions.
content: U.S. special envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner are expected to arrive in Islamabad on Saturday.

zh.title: 伊朗称未计划在巴基斯坦与美国谈判代表会面,特朗普特使即将前往伊斯兰堡
zh.summary: 美国特使史蒂夫·威特科夫和贾里德·库什纳正前往伊斯兰堡进行外交接触,尽管伊朗表示未安排美伊直接谈判。此访强调了在更广泛的地缘政治紧张局势中该地区正在进行的外交努力。

title: England shirt overpriced, says £40k kits collector
summary: A collector with a £40k kit collection argues that classic England shirts offer better value than newly manufactured ones. This highlights concerns about pricing on modern official merchandise.
content: Collector Les Motherby says classic England shirts are often better value than new ones.

zh.title: 英格兰球衣定价过高，4万英镑球衣收藏家发声
zh.summary: 拥有4万英镑球衣收藏的收藏家认为，经典英格兰球衣相比新制造的球衣更具价值。这突显了人们对现代官方球衣商品定价的担忧。

title: Rescue centre facing eviction makes funding appeal
summary: Redhead Rescues Animal Sanctuary in Northamptonshire faces eviction and has launched a funding campaign to purchase its own property. The move would provide long-term security for the animal rescue center.
content: Redhead Rescues Animal Sanctuary in Northamptonshire wants to buy its own land.

zh.title: 动物救援中心面临驱赶，启动筹款活动
zh.summary: 位于北安普顿郡的红头救援动物保护区面临驱赶，已启动筹款活动以购买自己的地产。此举将为该动物救援中心提供长期保障。
